benefits.description: Lower back pain improved significantly since starting CJC/TB500 combo; reports it feels the best it has after trying many traditional treatments

protocol_notes: OP is 39 years old, uses compounded peptides from partner's TRT/peptide company at cost. Gets labs every 90 days to monitor organs and levels. Staggered introduction of new peptides to identify effects individually. Noted that site injections of BPC-157 near elbow injury did not help; switched to systemic subcutaneous injections. Running a large stack including multiple peptides and TRT. Compounding done at pharmacy/lab level so each syringe contains only one peptide. Pre-loads syringes for approximately one week.
